title: Transparent Armor
body:
✨ Transparent Armour Texture Pack – See Your Skin Anywhere! ✨

This texture pack is made for players who love showing their custom skin, even while wearing armour in survival or public servers. Normally, when you put on armour, your whole skin gets covered and no one can see your style. But with this pack, you can stay protected AND show your skin at the same time!

The pack makes all major armours transparent, including:

• Diamond
• Netherite
• Gold
• Copper
• Iron
• Leather

Everything becomes clear and clean, so your skin stays fully visible while you play. No more hiding your character design, no more feeling sad that other players can’t see your look. Just wear the armour you want and enjoy your skin shining through.

This texture pack is perfect for PvP, public servers, SMPs, or even roleplay. It keeps the original shape of the armour but removes the visual blocks, making it smooth, simple, and beautiful. It also helps you take screenshots, record videos, or show your outfit without losing any gameplay safety.

If you want a pack that is easy to use, lightweight, and looks clean and modern, then this Transparent Armour Pack is the best choice for you. Enjoy playing with both style and protection!
